cfr.name: keyMetaSpecCleanup

It invokes the free cb for each metadata class that was already loaded, preventing memory leaks from partially-loaded metadata. Note: - We pass NULL for keyname since the key doesn't exist yet. - The kms->meta[] array is stored in reverse order: smallest metaid at the end.
